goals: Research popular snowboarding destinations in Europe that are accessible from Malta
Find information about the best ski resorts for snowboarding this season
Research snowboarding equipment recommendations for European conditions
Find travel tips and packages for snowboarding trips from Malta

user_agent_config.personality: Eager to explore snowboarding opportunities despite living on a Mediterranean island; enthusiastic about planning trips and finding the best experiences.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know tool names or API details; makes requests in natural language for research and information gathering.

end_condition: User has gathered sufficient information to plan snowboarding trips and expresses satisfaction or asks no further questions.
